fields.label: Work Order #
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sWorkOrderNumber FROM tblRepair ORDER BY dtDateIn DESC

fields.label: Client
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 c.sClientName1 FROM tblRepair r LEFT JOIN tblDepartment d ON d.lDepartmentKey = r.lDepartmentKey LEFT JOIN tblClient c ON c.lClientKey = d.lClientKey ORDER BY r.dtDateIn DESC

fields.label: Department
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 d.sDepartmentName FROM tblRepair r LEFT JOIN tblDepartment d ON d.lDepartmentKey = r.lDepartmentKey ORDER BY r.dtDateIn DESC

fields.label: Scope Type
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 st.sScopeTypeDesc FROM tblRepair r LEFT JOIN tblScope s ON s.lScopeKey = r.lScopeKey LEFT JOIN tblScopeType st ON st.lScopeTypeKey = s.lScopeTypeKey ORDER BY r.dtDateIn DESC

fields.label: Scope Category
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 stc.sScopeTypeCategory FROM tblRepair r LEFT JOIN tblScope s ON s.lScopeKey = r.lScopeKey LEFT JOIN tblScopeType st ON st.lScopeTypeKey = s.lScopeTypeKey LEFT JOIN tblScopeTypeCategories stc ON stc.lScopeTypeCategoryKey = st.lScopeTypeCatKey ORDER BY r.dtDateIn DESC
fields.notes: Category shown in detail view instead of raw type when available; FK: lScopeTypeCatKey -> tblScopeTypeCategories

fields.label: Serial #
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 s.sSerialNumber FROM tblRepair r LEFT JOIN tblScope s ON s.lScopeKey = r.lScopeKey ORDER BY r.dtDateIn DESC

fields.label: Status
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 rs.sRepairStatus FROM tblRepair r LEFT JOIN tblRepairStatuses rs ON rs.lRepairStatusID = r.lRepairStatusID ORDER BY r.dtDateIn DESC

fields.label: Closed
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(sRepairClosed,'N') AS sRepairClosed FROM tblRepair ORDER BY dtDateIn DESC
fields.notes: Column: sRepairClosed; 'Y' = closed. List filters WHERE sRepairClosed != 'Y'

fields.label: Urgent Flag
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(bHotList, 0) AS IsUrgent FROM tblRepair ORDER BY dtDateIn DESC

fields.label: Tech (Primary)
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 t.sTechName FROM tblRepair r LEFT JOIN tblTechnicians t ON t.lTechnicianKey = r.lTechnicianKey ORDER BY r.dtDateIn DESC

fields.label: Date In
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 CONVERT(VARCHAR, dtDateIn, 101) FROM tblRepair ORDER BY dtDateIn DESC

fields.label: Days In
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 DATEDIFF(day, dtDateIn, GETDATE()) FROM tblRepair ORDER BY dtDateIn DESC

fields.label: Date Approved
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 CONVERT(VARCHAR, dtAprRecvd, 101) FROM tblRepair WHERE dtAprRecvd IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dtDateIn DESC
fields.notes: Column: dtAprRecvd — date approval was received from customer

fields.label: Est. Delivery Date
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 CONVERT(VARCHAR, dtExpDelDate, 101) FROM tblRepair WHERE dtExpDelDate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dtDateIn DESC

fields.label: Ship Date
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 CONVERT(VARCHAR, dtShipDate, 101) FROM tblRepair WHERE dtShipDate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dtDateIn DESC

fields.label: Amount Approved
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 dblAmtRepair FROM tblRepair WHERE dblAmtRepair IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dtDateIn DESC

fields.label: Outbound Tracking #
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sShipTrackingNumber FROM tblRepair WHERE sShipTrackingNumber IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dtDateIn DESC

fields.label: Invoice Number
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sInvoiceNumber FROM tblRepair WHERE sInvoiceNumber IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dtDateIn DESC
fields.notes: Column: sInvoiceNumber on tblRepair — stores the linked invoice reference

fields.label: Complaint / Description
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 LEFT(sComplaintDesc, 100) FROM tblRepair WHERE sComplaintDesc IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dtDateIn DESC

fields.label: Internal Notes
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 LEFT(CAST(mComments AS NVARCHAR(MAX)), 100) FROM tblRepair WHERE mComments IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dtDateIn DESC

fields.label: Purchase Order #
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sPurchaseOrder FROM tblRepair WHERE sPurchaseOrder IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dtDateIn DESC
fields.notes: VERIFY: column name sPurchaseOrder not yet confirmed in full controller — check /header patch endpoint

fields.label: Rack Location
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sRackLocation FROM tblRepair WHERE sRackLocation IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dtDateIn DESC
fields.notes: VERIFY: column name sRackLocation not yet confirmed in full controller
